metaDescription: Exploring faith, hope, and the love of God through scripture.

hero.title:
Rooted in Faith,
Growing in Grace
hero.subtitle: Daily reflections, biblical wisdom, and encouragement for your spiritual journey.

about.title: About This Blog
about.paragraph1: Welcome to Faith & Fellowship — a place where we explore the depths of God's love, the beauty of Scripture, and the joy of walking in relationship with Jesus Christ.
about.paragraph2: Whether you are a lifelong believer or just beginning to explore faith, our hope is that these words encourage, challenge, and draw you closer to the heart of God.
about.verse: “Let the message of Christ dwell among you richly…” — Colossians 3:16

subscribe.title: Stay Connected
subscribe.subtitle: Subscribe to receive new posts delivered straight to your inbox.
subscribe.successMsg: Thanks for subscribing! You'll hear from us soon.
